titleStmt.title: SII 27.51: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 51. (A.R. No. 535 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field behind the Bazar street.

This badly damaged record registers a gift of lands and coconutgarden, for feeding brāhmaṇas in the maṭha attached to Narasiṁhadēva temple, by Chikka-Maleya-daṇṇāyaka younger brother of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Maleya-daṇṇāyaka. The latter was governing Bārakūru-rājya. The gift was left in-charge of Viṭhala-hebāra, son of Nāraṇa hebāra of Naḍumane.

It is dated [Śaka 1286], Krōdhi, Kārttika śu. 11, Sunday. The Śaka year was current. The details are irregular as the tithi corresponds to 1364 A.D., November 6, when the weekday was Wednesday. If, however, the cyclic year is a mistake for Viśvāvasu, the other details would regularly correspond to 1365 A.D., October 26.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
1287 ne krōdhi saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 11 Ā daṁdu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣage tappavarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīra bu
kaṁṇa voḍeyara vijayarājyābhyudayalu śrī bukaṁṇa voḍe
śrī manumahāmaṁḍalēśvara maleyadaṁṇāykaru bā
rakura rājyavanāḷuva li Avara taṁmaṁdira cakkamaleya daṁṇnā
ḷagaṇa narasiṁhvadēvara
trada brahmādāyada bāḷa koṭu barisi koṭṭasilāśāsana
da kramaveṁteṁdaḍe bayidūra
bayidūra paṭṭaṇasvāmi ya ya
seṭṭiyiṁ mūlavāgi teṁgina hittilu mattaṁ sīme
ya kōṭiseṭṭiyaṁ mūlavāgibaṁda teṁgina hittilu mattayi
nāraṇaseṭiyaṁ mūlavāgi baṁda teṁgina hittalu matta
yiṁdaṁ krayavāgi baṁda teṁgina hittalu mattaṁ kanamābu
krayavāgi baṁda teṁgina hittilu mattaṁ
mūlavāgi baṁdabāḷu teṁgina hittilu Aṁntu yiṣṭabāḷina catu
ssīme braṁmma nāraṇaseṭi gadeya gaṭi
yaṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
dēvasva dorajana baḷiyavara mūlada hittilu
gaṇa bhaṁḍāri viṭhalaseṭiya kōṭi gu
baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagaṇagaḍi tūḷaba
ragaḍi kusi seṭiya viṭhalaseṭi bittuva
gaḍiyaṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya voḷaga bhaṁḍāri
krayavāgi baṁda teṁgina hitilu sahita A bā
ḷoḷaguḷa nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāṁmyayi yēnuḷa
cika maleya daṁṇāykaru Ā narasiṁhha dē
vara maṭhadaluṁba brāhmaṇabhōjanakke hiraṁṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvva
kavāgi dhāreya neṟadukūṭa Ā bāḷanu yeḍitoṟeya naḍumaneya nā
raṇahebāruvana makaḷu viṭhalahebāruvaṁge nāyaru mūlavāgi koṭṭa
ru naḍumaneya viṭhalahebāruvanu Ā bāḷanu teṁgina hitilanu
du baṁdu Ā narasiṁhhadēvara maṭhadaluṁba brāhmaṇa bhōjana
ke varuṣaṁ prati gēṇiyanū votada hāniyalu voraveya
yāgi hāni nālvattaṟa lekkada Akkiya mūḍe 60 nū naḍasi bahaṁ
tāgi barasi koṭa silāśāsana Akṣaradalu Akkiya mūḍe Aṟuva
tu ke Ā maleya daṁṇāykara suhastada vūpa ca
vuḍapana baraha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā
ṣaṣṭhirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmāṁnyō
yaṁ dharṁmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhi sarvvā
sētānbhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra.
yi dharmmake Āru Ayipidavaru śrīvāraṇāsiyali sāvira kavileya
koṁda dōṣake hōharu bopaṇa yi bāḷina kō
ba yi dhar(ṁ)mmada bāḷiṁge naḍavaru .
Digital edition of SII 27.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
